description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On February 17 (Tuesday), we received a donation from the Reiwa 7 (2025) Hanno City 60th Birthday Gathering Organizing Committee.

We will use this donation to further advance child-related policies, including seamless childcare support for the children who will lead our future.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202602/13215.html
summary: 📝 Mayor receives donation from the Reiwa 7 Hanno City 60th Birthday Gathering Organizing Committee
